title: Hey Gainax you like making money off of your whores right
display_title: Hey Gainax you like making money off of your whores right
wikitext:
[]: Hey Gainax, you like making money off of your whores, right?             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Wed Jul 08, 2009 8:24 pm Do you think you could produce a regular PVC version of this ? Only, you know, after you fix the face a little.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 08, 2009 9:10 pm I wasn't aware anyone from Gainax hung out here.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Wed Jul 08, 2009 9:20 pm It probably doesn't matter, Gainax/Khara have reached a new low (cut) with those test plugsuits so they're bound to market anything if there's enough money in it.

[]: Re: Hey Gainax, you like making money off of your whores, ri             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Wed Jul 08, 2009 9:50 pm I Accidentally Dracula wrote: Hey Gainax, you like making money off of your whores, right?

[]: Re: Hey Gainax, you like making money off of your whores, ri             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Wed Jul 08, 2009 10:20 pm Orphan Of Darkness wrote: That's either the best or worst thread name I have seen on this forum so far haha. It's not Hikari's fault though, so don't insult the ideal-Japanese-anime-girl! :p

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jul 08, 2009 11:13 pm Some (meaning very few) of their models they sell are quite adorable. But, you're right. I do tend to notice more of the sensual than the adorable with Gianax. And, Dracula. The picture you posted seems to fall under the "adorable" category (for me anyway), and not so much the other, more sensual stuff I didn't want to look at either. I mustn't run away! I mustn't run away! I mustn't run away!

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 08, 2009 11:32 pm I do however like the color orange on a plug suit for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by NickFury90 » Wed Jul 08, 2009 11:40 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: I do however like the color orange on a plug suit for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jul 08, 2009 11:53 pm With a little work that would be a very cute Hikari-chan. I wouldn't buy it (I don't buy almost any merchandise) but somebody would.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Wed Jul 08, 2009 11:55 pm Even though the plugsuit is a carbon copy of Asuka's suit except orange, it still looks cool. I agree orange is a good color for the suit. But whoever designed that doll did a terrible job on Hikari. I don't know it just looks really bad.

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Thu Jul 09, 2009 12:02 am Is it just me or does she look a bit chibi. Her eyes are rounder and bigger than they should be.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Thu Jul 09, 2009 10:04 am NemZ wrote: With a little work that would be a very cute Hikari-chan. I wouldn't buy it (I don't buy almost any merchandise) but somebody would.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jul 09, 2009 11:55 am The Gundam back there is like "I'm not part of this".

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Thu Jul 09, 2009 3:22 pm So this is Hikari in a Ubuntu Edition Plug Suit?

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Thu Jul 09, 2009 8:32 pm Fast Tony DeNiro wrote: Even though the plugsuit is a carbon copy of Asuka's suit except orange

[]:             Quote Post by cambaprecoz » Thu Jul 09, 2009 9:09 pm Hikari is not a whore, nor a pilot. I hate figurines! if they're not posable, what's the point? That why I love Revoltechs, way cooler that figurines.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jul 09, 2009 9:37 pm I agree with you and kaworus/Tojis plug suits look cool I think.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Thu Jul 09, 2009 10:57 pm cambaprecoz wrote: Hikari is not ... a pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 10, 2009 1:21 am I Accidentally Dracula wrote: Really , now.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Fri Jul 10, 2009 1:26 am Fur den schlag von vorhn? Auge um auge! Zahn um zahn. And I have no idea what I just said.
